title: Quantum Computing Portfolio

# Quantum Computing Portfolio

Authors: Cory, Correo Hofstad
Published: 2024-06-09T04:45:14Z
Subjects: Chemistry, Computer and Information Science, Engineering, Physics, Other
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/GHUHKM

Correo Hofstad has partnered with Gundam, Nvidia, Boeing/HPE, Tripp Lite, Watchguard, and Logic to manufacture the world's first high bandwidth 800QGb/s networking switches. The devices are hard to sell because no one knows that they exist yet. https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/networking/infiniband-switching/

Citation: Cory, Correo Hofstad, 2024, "Quantum Computing Portfolio", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/GHUHKM, Harvard Dataverse, V1
